Bash(gemini -p "Generate a hero background image for a professional portfolio website. Requirements: - Dark background base color #0A0A0B - Subtle abstract geometric shapes and flowing lines - Purple accent gradient using #7C3AED to #A78BFA - Very subtle, not distracting — text will be overlaid on top - Minimal, modern, tech-savvy aesthetic - Slight glow/bloom effects on the purple elements - The design should feel like fintech/AI industry - Resolution: 1920x1080 - Save the image to /Users/ellie/Documents/elliebinn.github.io/public/assets/hero-bg.png" -y --sandbox false)

Bash(gemini -p "Generate a hero background image for a portfolio website of a PM/Service Planner who builds AI products. Requirements: - Clean and modern, NOT too dark - Base: deep navy to dark purple gradient \(#1a1a2e to #2d1b69\) - Brighter than pure black, should feel alive and vibrant - Accent: purple glow #7C3AED and light purple #A78BFA - Abstract flowing light trails or soft aurora-like waves - Subtle interconnected nodes/dots suggesting AI/data connections - The design should feel premium, confident, and distinctive - Make ME stand out — this is a personal brand hero image - Clean negative space in center-left area \(text goes there\) - Soft bokeh or light particles for depth - NO charts, NO icons, NO text - Resolution: 1920x1080 - Save to /Users/ellie/Documents/elliebinn.github.io/public/assets/hero-bg-v2.png" -y --sandbox false)

Bash(gemini -p "Generate a portfolio hero illustration. Style: Clean monochrome pencil sketch style like a modern editorial illustration, similar to Behance portfolio covers. The illustration should show a young Korean woman with these exact features: long straight black hair with see-through bangs, brown eyes, soft natural smile, wearing a black round-neck top. She should be sitting in a modern chair, working on a laptop, looking confident and professional. The pose should be relaxed but focused - like a PM/product planner working on her next project. Style reference: clean line art, minimal shading, monochrome grayscale with slight warmth. White/light background. Full body or 3/4 body shot. Resolution 1920x1080 landscape format with the character positioned center-right, leaving space on the left for text overlay. Save to /Users/ellie/Documents/elliebinn.github.io/public/assets/hero-illustration-v1.png" -y --sandbox false)
